tools.name: -health-check
tools.description: Internal health check tool. Verifies API keys and connectivity.

tools.name: file-to-markdown
tools.description: Convert files to Markdown using AI (synchronous). Supports PDF (with intelligent chunking for large files). Use file-to-markdown-async for long-running jobs.

inputPath.description: Path to the file to convert

outputPath.description: Optional output path (defaults to input path with .md extension)

chunkSize.description: Pages per chunk for large PDFs (default: 10). Only used for PDFs >3MB

maxRetries.description: Maximum retries per chunk if processing fails (default: 3)

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds per chunk (default: 120000 for chunks, 180000 for direct processing)

tools.name: file-to-markdown-async
tools.description: Convert files to Markdown asynchronously (non-blocking). Returns a job ID immediately. Use get-job-status to check progress.

inputPath.description: Path to the file to convert

outputPath.description: Optional output path (defaults to input path with .md extension)

chunkSize.description: Pages per chunk for large PDFs (default: 10)

maxRetries.description: Maximum retries per chunk if processing fails (default: 3)

tools.name: get-job-status
tools.description: Get the status of an async job. Returns current progress, status, and results when completed.

jobId.description: The job ID returned by file-to-markdown-async

tools.name: list-jobs
tools.description: List all jobs with optional filters. Useful for checking active jobs or recent completions.

status.description: Filter by status: queued, processing, completed, failed, cancelled

limit.description: Maximum number of jobs to return (default: 20)

tools.name: cancel-job
tools.description: Cancel a queued or processing job. Cannot cancel completed/failed jobs.

tools.name: audio-to-text
tools.description: Transcribe audio files to text using OpenAI Whisper API. Supports .m4a, .mp3, .wav, .ogg, .webm, .opus and other audio formats.

inputPath.description: Path to the audio file to transcribe

language.description: Optional: Language code (e.g., 'es' for Spanish, 'en' for English). Auto-detected if not provided.

tools.name: svg-to-png
tools.description: Convert SVG files to PNG with optional width/height constraints

inputPath.description: Path to the SVG file to convert

outputPath.description: Optional output path (defaults to input path with .png extension)
